danger_signals.visual_form: cardboard cutout depicting a criminal character
danger_signals.meaning: target that must be shot; shooting results in points; failure to shoot results in life loss

danger_signals.visual_form: gangster cutout positioned with weapons or threatening posture
cutouts appearing from behind urban structures in city block rounds
danger_signals.meaning: unexpected threat; requires rapid threat assessment

safety_signals.visual_form: cardboard cutout depicting uniformed law enforcement
safety_signals.meaning: friendly/allied non-target; shooting results in life loss penalty

safety_signals.visual_form: cardboard cutout depicting women and innocent bystanders
safety_signals.meaning: protected non-combatant; shooting results in life loss penalty

safety_signals.visual_form: plain, featureless background in wall rounds
safety_signals.meaning: controlled, safe environment for threat assessment; maximum visibility; reduced environmental complexity

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: police uniform visual markers on cutouts
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: represented as protected targets alongside gangsters in mixed threat scenarios

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: gangster clothing and weapon imagery on cutouts
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: primary targets in wall and city block environments; depicted as urban threats

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: everyday clothing and civilian appearance on cutouts
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: integrated into urban backdrop; presented as collateral risk in city block rounds

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: blank wall backdrop with three cardboard cutouts in static positions
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: cutouts turn to face player after positioning; slower presentation rate; clear visual isolation of targets

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: city block backdrop with building structures; cutouts pre-exposed as they emerge from environment
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: five cutouts per round instead of three; faster emergence rate; targets partially hidden behind urban structures

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: same environmental layouts (wall and city) but visual presentation speed increases after bonus round completion
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: cutout emergence and positioning occurs at accelerated pace; reduced reaction time available to player

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: environmental shift to open space with tin cans as objects of focus; ledges and throwing mechanism visible
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: limited ammunition supply; cans thrown from side of screen; player must arc shots to land targets on opposite ledges

environmental_storytelling.example: transition from blank wall (controlled training) to city block (realistic urban scenario) signals narrative progression from isolated drills to field-relevant situations
presentation of gangsters alongside police officers and civilians communicates rules of engagement: must distinguish between threat and protected persons in shared spaces
city block round cutouts positioned behind or emerging from building structures visually establishes urban environment complexity and reduced visibility conditions
modes titled 'Hogan's Alley' reference real FBI training range, establishing law enforcement training context through nomenclature

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: moves into position against backdrop and turns to face player; signals readiness as threat
appears from behind urban structures already exposed; creates urgency and surprise factor
static position alongside gangsters; serves as visual constraint on player action
static position alongside gangsters; communicates non-threat status through civilian appearance; visual penalty mechanism if targeted
thrown across screen; requires arc trajectory for ledge landing; communicates skill-based reward mechanic separate from threat elimination

notes: Hogan's Alley communicates world-state through progressive environmental complexity (blank wall → urban setting) and behavioral acceleration (speed increases per round cycle). The core manifestation system operates through visual target classification: gangsters (shoot) vs. police/civilians (don't shoot). This binary distinction is the game's primary world-state communication mechanism. The bonus round with tin cans establishes secondary skill expression outside threat elimination. No color-coding or complex faction symbolism present; identification relies on silhouette, clothing, and contextual positioning.
